{"action":"opened","issue":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/56537","repository_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia","labels_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/56537/labels{/name}","comments_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/56537/comments","events_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/56537/events","html_url":"https://github.com/JuliaLang/julia/issues/56537","id":2653656148,"node_id":"I_kwDOABkWpM6eK5RU","number":56537,"title":"`Base.cp` seems to have a bug when copying large files","user":{"login":"sriharshakandala","id":55154978,"node_id":"MDQ6VXNlcjU1MTU0OTc4","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/55154978?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/sriharshakandala","html_url":"https://github.com/sriharshakandala","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/sriharshakandala/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/sriharshakandala/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/sriharshakandala/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/sriharshakandala/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/sriharshakandala/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/sriharshakandala/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/sriharshakandala/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/sriharshakandala/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/sriharshakandala/received_events","type":"User","user_view_type":"public","site_admin":false},"labels":[],"state":"open","locked":false,"assignee":null,"assignees":[],"milestone":null,"comments":0,"created_at":"2024-11-12T23:41:12Z","updated_at":"2024-11-12T23:41:12Z","closed_at":null,"author_association":"NONE","sub_issues_summary":{"total":0,"completed":0,"percent_completed":0},"active_lock_reason":null,"body":"# Issue
`Base.cp` seems to have a bug when copying large files (~17 GB).

For example, 
```
cp ifs_oper_T1279_2016080100.nc atmos_dyamond_summer/ifs_oper_T1279_2016080100.nc
``` 
works fine, but,
```
Base.cp("ifs_oper_T1279_2016080100.nc", "atmos_dyamond_summer/ifs_oper_T1279_2016080100.nc")
```
tries to create a huge file that eventually uses up all the space on the hard drive before crashing.

However, using 
```
run(`cp ifs_oper_T1279_2016080100.nc atmos_dyamond_summer/ifs_oper_T1279_2016080100.nc`)
```
instead works correctly.

etc."}],"state":"open","locked":false,"assignee":null,"assignees":[],"milestone":null,"comments":3,"created_at":"2024-11-12T23:41:12Z","updated_at":"2024-11-13T14:04:03Z","closed_at":null,"author_association":"NONE","sub_issues_summary":{"total":0,"completed":0,"percent_completed":0},"active_lock_reason":null,"body":"# Issue
`Base.cp` seems to have a bug when copying large files (~17 GB).

For example, 
```
cp ifs_oper_T1279_2016080100.nc atmos_dyamond_summer/ifs_oper_T1279_2016080100.nc
``` 
works fine, but,
```
Base.cp("ifs_oper_T1279_2016080100.nc", "atmos_dyamond_summer/ifs_oper_T1279_2016080100.nc")
```
tries to create a huge file that eventually uses up all the space on the hard drive before crashing.

However, using 
```
run(`cp ifs_oper_T1279_2016080100.nc atmos_dyamond_summer/ifs_oper_T1279_2016080100.nc`)
```
instead works correctly.

A more detailed description of the issue can be found https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaArtifacts/pull/64 and https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaArtifacts/pull/69

`Base.cp` calls [`sendfile`](https://github.com/JuliaLang/julia/blob/5cc5878cf63b6f832ce9c2d54712ba7a405b28e1/base/filesystem.jl#L218-L231), which calls [`jl_fs_sendfile` which calls `uv_fs_sendfile`](https://github.com/JuliaLang/julia/blob/5cc5878cf63b6f832ce9c2d54712ba7a405b28e1/src/jl_uv.c#L586-L587) from libuv, which calls an OS routine. What operating system are you on?

This is on MacOs `Sequoia 15.0.1`","reactions":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/comments/2473711213/reactions","total_count":0,"+1":0,"-1":0,"laugh":0,"hooray":0,"confused":0,"heart":0,"rocket":0,"eyes":0},"performed_via_github_app":null}}
